title: Molten Quick Ukrainian Myeongnan-roe Fritters
description: A quick and easy Ukrainian dish featuring sweet molten myeongnan-roe and crispy fried dough. Serve with a side of tangy dipping sauce for a flavorful snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add the eggs, water, and myeongnan-roe.
Mix the dough until it comes together in a sticky ball.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and fry the dough for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot with a side of dipping sauce.
To make the dipping sauce, combine 1 cup of mayonnaise, 1 tablespoon of ketchup, and 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh dill in a bowl.
Mix the dipping sauce until well combined and serve with the fritters.
